## TRM1.2. Terminal capacity incentive scheme

In the first year of RP4, with an ATFM Arr delay of 0.01 min/arr, Sweden **achieved the national target** of 0.35 min/arr.

However, the pivot value for incentives calculation is limited to CRSTMP delay causes, and was set at also 0.035 min/arr. As CRSTMP delay was null (i.e. no CRSTMP delay in 2025), **the maximum bonus of 1.0%** applies. As such, the NSA computes a bonus of SEK 2,212,080.95.
